description: Crossref: kf persons → HLS IDs → EOS person spans. 162 kf persons have HLS IDs (from SSRQ TTL). 8 of 162 found in EOS HGB Basel (75,447 docs, 1400-1700). High quality = exact name + lifetime year overlap. Medium = name variant + year overlap. Note: historical dates are often approximate — year checks have ±20yr tolerance.
